affected_pattern: Dormant accounts suddenly appearing with 10x usage in a distant country
root_cause: Account takeover via SIM swap — adversary performed SIM swap through a social-engineered CSR and immediately initiated high-value international calling and data.
supporting_evidence: Usage Spike RCA Playbook: SIM Swap Account Takeover pattern
CSR audit trail shows SIM swap minutes before first fraudulent billing record
Destination numbers match known high-risk international ranges
recommended_action: Immediate suspension and fraud investigation for affected accounts
Reverse all fraudulent charges per operator fraud policy
Require callback + 2FA for any future SIM swap
Retrain CSR staff on social-engineering red flags
